1.1.0.en: Added Deye Hybrid 3-phase (SG04LP3), Microinverter 2MPPT and 4MPPT drivers. Improved pairing: UDP broadcast discovery (no IP needed) and manual serial fallback for custom passwords. Fixed morning unavailability bug at dawn startup.

1.0.1.en: Support for Deye SUN-5/6/8/10/12K-G03 (2 MPPT) and SUN-15/20K-G03 (4 MPPT)
